## Testing
- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run`

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commits format
- [ ] No secrets or credentials
- [ ] New fixtures (if any) validate against `schema/inventory.schema.json`
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from the linked issue verified
